content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于7月7日15:30(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！

【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年7月21日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】

一、战斗

【描述调整】
● 调整了「怨恨锁链」状态的描述，明确承受主动伤害时才会触发封印效果，且封印的卡牌为所有卡牌，而非仅指令卡，实际效果不变。
● 调整了唤醒体「熔毁·朵尔」关于「伤害强效提高」相关的文本描述，由「提高 50%」调整为「+50%」，实际效果不变。
● 「临时疯狂」状态的文本颜色由白色调整为绿色。

【相位对弈】
● 平衡性调整
    ○ 通用
        ■ 词缀「幻影」改为 「幻影 3」：可以打出 3 次，不再给回手的牌增加算力消耗和虚无，打出其他卡牌导致的算力消耗降低跨回合继承。
    ○ 唤醒体
        ■ 庞托斯
            ● 狂气爆发「无休猎宴」：现在仅有在对友方目标释放时获得护盾，并且目标友方也会获得护盾，获得护盾从 24 降低为 12。
            ● 衍生技能「猎魇」：改为 对敌方造成 6 伤害，损失一半伤害量的生命 或 使友方获得 6 护盾。抽 1 张牌。
        ■ 希洛
            ● 狂气爆发「绝境求生」：伤害从 24 降低为 20。
        ■ 哈姆林
            ● 狂气爆发「原初的乐音」：附加出血从 25% 提高为 50%，拥有负面效果时出血从 50% 提高为 100%。
        ■ 达芙黛尔
            ● 技能「千面重叠」：现在伤害叠加效果会以状态形式显示在唤醒体身上，死亡会清除。
        ■ 阿拉克涅
            ● 技能「纺织」：现在次数叠加效果会以状态形式显示在唤醒体身上，死亡会清除。
            ● 技能「预言」：降低算力从 1 提高为 2。
        ■ 茉夏
            ● 技能「逆境狂意」：强化和狂气不再延迟。
        ■ 皮克曼
            ● 狂气爆发「真实，亦是幻想」：增加 1 强效。
        ■ 莉兹
            ● 技能「黎明氦闪」：伤害从 32 提高为 36。
        ■ 诞妄·墨菲
            ● 技能「虚妄隆宠」：改为扣除全体敌方狂气。
        ■ 旺达
            ● 技能「活尸之墙」：算力消耗从 0 提高为 1，不再获得反击，而是抽 1 牌。
            ● 技能「脊刺」：算力消耗从 3 提高为 4，伤害从 7 降低为 6。
        ■ 尤乌哈希
            ● 技能「尖啸」：算力消耗从 4 降低为 3。
            ● 技能「血的悲歌」：算力消耗从 2 提高为 4。
        ■ 莱克
            ● 技能「十环出牌！」：算力消耗从 3 提高为 4，伤害从 4 降低为 3。
        ■ 波吕克斯
            ● 技能「亵渎圣心」：算力消耗从 3 提高为 4。
    ○ 命轮
        ■ 「指向歧路的罗盘」：现在指向歧路的罗盘状态不会被非唤醒体伤害移除。
        ■ 「命运轮盘赌」：算力消耗从 3 提高为 4。
    ○ 钥令
        ■ 「重逢心愿」：算力消耗降低效果从 1 提高为 2，现在该卡牌会出现在第二个抽牌堆顶部。
        ■ 「跨越回溯之扉」：回溯后剩余生命从 30% 提高为 35%，突袭后剩余生命从 60% 提高为 70%。
        ■ 「残忍的致意」：获得技能从 3 降低为 2。
        ■ 「黑天鹅的舞步」：
            ● 现在只有基础算力为 5 的「技能」会获得预备2，其余「技能」依旧获得预备1。
            ● 现在被「黑天鹅的舞步」影响的卡牌会有独特的特效提示。

二、问题修复

【活动】
● 修复了活动「永远的厄波扬斯」的玩法关卡「二元论」的描述中，融蚀文字无法正常显示的问题。

【故事】
● 本地化
    ○ 简体中文
        ■ 修复了头像「永不褪色的昨天：弥利亚姆」名称中，「弥利亚姆」误写为「弥丽亚姆」的问题。
        ■ 修复了「调查行动」第二部 4-2「引航典仪」中，「杜勒赛因」误写为「杜勒塞因」的问题。
        ■ 修复了「秘典书库」的广播剧「最初的晚餐」中，「杜勒赛因」误写为「杜勒塞因」的问题。
    ○ 韩语 
        ■ 修复了主界面等多处文字不统一的问题，如将「새로운」「신규」统一为「New」、「팀」统一为「파티」。
        ■ 修复了部分提示信息中的文字错误。
        ■ 修复了部分界面文本如卡牌类型等，措辞不当或显示异常的问题。。
    ○ 通用
        ■ 修复了英语、俄语等部分语言设置下，「相位对弈-收藏」中，唤醒体「庞托斯」的狂气爆发描述显示不完整的问题。

【战斗】
● 唤醒体和命轮
    ○ 修复了「怒涛」姿态下，「必定暴击」的指令卡会使「怒涛」姿态的触腕攻击也必定暴击的问题。
        ■ 包含以下指令卡：「庞托斯」的「纵魇掠袭」、「皮克曼」的「蚀骨色彩」、「徐」的「入骨相思」、「弥利亚姆」的「打击」和「无上生祭」。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「凯刻斯」灵塑适性等级为 2 时，「承自异端止血」的触腕攻击和反击额外伤害提升错误为 11％ 的问题，应当为 110％。 
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」触发吞噬效果或打出「提线木偶」后，「囚魇」算力消耗也会被降低的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「尤乌哈希」觉醒「红祭礼」会错误地免疫命轮「梦游仙境」施加的「无法行动效果」的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「尤乌哈希」多次释放狂气爆发后，无法通过任何方式再次获得狂气的问题。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「莉兹」激活启灵 2 「不朽绿炎」后，打出防御触发敌方中毒效果时，未拥有中毒状态的敌人也会被错误地施加中毒触发特效的问题。
● 命轮
    ○ 修复了命轮「梦游仙境」施加的「无法打出卡牌」效果未能随「意识干涉」状态结束而清除的问题。
    ○ 修复了命轮「梦游仙境」施加的「无法打出卡牌」效果错误地使用了「卡牌封印」描述的问题。
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了在探索中，某些情况下部分卡牌的描述文本缺失的问题。
    ○ 修复了在「星辰篇」关卡的非战斗节点退出游戏重新登录后，关卡进度计数会错误地增加的问题。
    ○ 修复了「调查数据」中，基础狂气不为 100 的唤醒体「灵知觉醒」的描述错误地显示为「获得 50 狂气」的问题。修复后为「获得 50% 基础狂气」。
    ○ 修复了部分「唤醒体试玩」关卡中，若只有 1 名唤醒体出战，该唤醒体进行攻击时，血条和界域效果也错误地会跟随移动的问题。
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」造物「翠玉拓印」的描述错误地要求消耗的非衍生指令卡在「手牌中」的问题。修复后为「选择对应唤醒体的 1 张非衍生指令卡将其消耗」。
    ○ 修复了「星辰篇」造物「翠玉拓印」复制的卡牌错误地继承了「活焰」等状态的问题。修复后复制的卡牌为「原始复制」。
    ○ 修复了敌人背弃之网「涅芙蕾亚」的意图「覆水难收」错误地对非指令卡也施加了「迟缓」效果的问题。
    ○ 修复了敌人「深海淑女」意图「螺湮逆流」的驱散负面状态效果会错误地驱散守密人的负面状态的问题。
● 相位对弈
    ○ 修复唤醒体「庞托斯」的狂气爆发「无休猎宴」与反击逻辑不一致的问题。修复后友方受到致死伤害时不再转移伤害给「庞托斯」，「庞托斯」受到致死伤害时也不再转移伤害给敌方。
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「阿拉克涅」的狂气爆发「命途，依此谕示」在唤醒体复活后无法正确抵挡致死伤害的问题。
    ○ 修复了某些情况下长按的卡牌会在画面中卡住，需要打出其他卡牌才能恢复正常的问题。
    ○ 修复了多处战斗外的描述丢失的问题，如唤醒体「技能」的「预备」、「可以使用 3 次」等。修复后与实际效果一致。
    ○ 修复了使用 PC 游玩的情况下，使用指向性技能选择目标时，可以通过快捷键错误地选择其他卡牌打出的问题。
    ○ 修复了钥令「春天的献诗」未显示效果描述的问题。

【综合】
● 通讯器
    ○ 修复了联络人列表中，会错误地出现守密人自己的问题。
● 公告
    ○ 修复了部分维护公告中，韩语等部分语言的文本会错误地显示为方块的问题。
● 密境课室
    ○ 修复了某些情况下「日常试训」或「周常试训」会出现无法移除的红点的问题。
● 弥萨格商店
    ○ 修复了「限时礼盒」中购买全部礼盒并领取完奖励，切换到其他商店页面返回后，会错误地显示空白页面的问题。
● 校友会
    ○ 修复了关注已达上限后，在「追随者-新增」中点击「一键关注」的提示文本错误的的问题。修复后提示「关注人数已达上限」。
● 相位对弈
    ○ 修复了在「收藏-排行」中快速切换卡牌，提示「请求过于频繁，请稍后尝试」后，胜场排行页面错误地持续显示「数据请求中」，排行数据未能正常显示的问题。
    ○ 修复了观看较长的「相位对弈」战斗回放时，某些情况下会提示超时的问题。现在超时时间从 20 秒提高为 30 秒。
    ○ 修复了「收藏」和「预组编队」中，选择「全部」页签和类型页签时，卡牌的相对排序不一致的问题。

**V2.5.2.2 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on  July 7, 2026 at 15:30(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on July 21, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update Content]

I. Combat
[Description Adjustment]
● Adjusted the description of the "Chains of Resentment" State to clarify that the Sealed Effect is only triggered upon receiving Active DMG, and that the Sealed Cards refer to all Cards, not just Command Cards. The actual Effect remains unchanged.
● Adjusted the text description of Awakener "Doll: Inferno" regarding "DMG Amplification increase" from "increases by 50%" to "+50%". The actual Effect remains unchanged.
● The text color of the "Temporary Madness" State has been changed from white to green.

[Traphase]
● Balance Adjustments
○ General
■ Affix "Phantasm" changed to "Phantasm 3": Can be played 3 times, no longer adds Arithmetica Cost and Fleeting to Cards returned to Hand, and the Arithmetica Cost reduction caused by playing other Cards no longer carries over across turns.
○ Awakener
■ Pontos
● Exalt "Relentless Hunt": Now only grants a Shield when cast on a friendly target, and the friendly target also gains a Shield. Shield amount reduced from 24 to 12.
● Derived Skill "Reave-Gaunt": Changed to deal 6 DMG to an enemy, lose HP equal to half the DMG dealt, or grant an ally 6 Shield. Draw 1 card.

■ Helot
● Aliemus Exalt "Surviving Impasse": DMG reduced from 24 to 20.
■ Hameln
● Exalt "Primal Chord": Bleed application increased from 25% to 50%, and Bleed increased from 50% to 100% when afflicted with a negative Effect.
■ Daffodil
● Skill "Visages Overlay": The DMG stacking Effect will now be displayed as a State on the Awakener, and will be cleared upon death.
■ Arachne
● Skill "Weave": The stacking Effect count is now displayed as a State on the Awakener and will be cleared upon death.
● Skill "Prophecy": Reduce Arithmetica increases from 1 to 2.
■ Mouchette
● Skill "Adversity Rage": Enhance and Aliemus no longer Delay.
■ Pickman
● Aliemus Exalt "Truth in Delusion": Gain 1 Amplification.
■ Liz
● Skill "Helium Flash": DMG increased from 32 to 36.
■ Murphy: Fauxborn
● Skill "Illusory Favor": Changed to drain Aliemus from all enemies.
■ Wanda
● Skill "Wall of Corpses": Arithmetica Cost increased from 0 to 1, no longer gains Counter, but draws 1 card instead.
● Skill "Spine Needle": Arithmetica Cost increased from 3 to 4, DMG decreased from 7 to 6.
■ Uvhash
● Skill "Shriek": Arithmetica Cost reduced from 4 to 3.
● Skill "Dirge of Blood": Arithmetica Cost increased from 2 to 4.
■ Ryker
● Skill "Ten Rings, Play!": Arithmetica Cost increased from 3 to 4, DMG decreased from 4 to 3.
■ Pollux
● Skill "Defiled Heart": Arithmetica Cost increased from 3 to 4.
○ Wheel of Destiny
■ "Compass to False North": The Compass to False North State can no longer be removed by DMG dealt by non-Awakeners.
■ "Fate Roulette": Arithmetica Cost increased from 3 to 4.
○ Posse
■ "Reunion's Wish": The Arithmetica Cost reduction Effect increases from 1 to 2, and the Card now appears at the top of the second Draw Pile.
■ "Gateway of Retrospection": HP Left after Reset increases from 30% to 35%, and HP Left after Ambush increases from 60% to 70%.
■ "Cruel Homage": Skill gained reduced from 3 to 2.

■ "Black Swan's Dance":
● Now only "Skills" with a base Arithmetica of 5 gain Reserve 2, while all other "Skills" still gain Reserve 1.
● Cards currently affected by "Black Swan's Dance" will have a unique visual effect hint.

2. Bug Fixes

[Event]
● Fixed an issue in the Stage "Dualism" of the event "Ebwynnos Evermore" where Dissolution text was not displaying correctly.

[Story]
● Localization
○ Simplified Chinese
■ Fixed an issue where "Miryam" in the avatar name "Unfading Yesterday: Miryam" was incorrectly written as "Milyam."
■ Fixed an issue in Part 2, 4-2 "Rite of Passage" of "Investigation" where "Doresain" was incorrectly written as "Doresain."
■ Fixed an issue in the Radio Drama "The First Supper" in the Library where "Doresain" was incorrectly written as "Doresain".
○ Korean
■ Fixed system text in the main interface and other areas, such as unifying "새로운" and "신규" to "New", standardizing "팀" to "파티", and correcting typos in certain hint messages.
■ Applied varying degrees of wording and display optimizations to the UI text tables (including card type display, general text, multilingual configuration, etc.).
○ General
■ Fixed an issue where the Aliemus Burst description of the Awakener "Pontos" in "Traphase-Collection" was displayed incompletely under certain language settings such as English and Russian.
[Combat]
● Awakener and Wheel of Destiny
○ Fixed an issue where Command Cards with "guaranteed Critical Hit" in the "Raging Waves" stance would also cause the Tentacle Attacks in the "Raging Waves" stance to land as guaranteed Critical Hits.

■ Contains the following Command Cards: "Pontos's" "Gaunt Ravage", "Pickman's" "Chromaphage", "Xu's" "Bonesick Longing", "Miryam's" "Strike" and "Exalted Pyre".
○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Caecus" with Soulforge Aptitude Level 2 had the Tentacle Attack and Counter bonus DMG from "Inherited from Heretical Hemostasis" incorrectly increased to 11% instead of the correct 110%.
○ Fixed an issue where the Arithmetica Cost of "Gaunt" would also be reduced after the Awakener "Pickman" triggered the Devour Effect or played "Marionette".
○ Fixed an issue where Awakener "Uvhash"'s Rouse "Vermilion Rite" would incorrectly grant Immune to the "inability to Action Effect" inflicted by Wheel of Destiny "Dreaming of Wonderland".
○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Uvhash" could not regain Aliemus by any means after unleashing Exalt multiple times.
○ Fixed an issue where, after the Awakener "Liz" activated Enlighten 2 "Eternal Flames," playing DEF to trigger the enemy's Poison Effect would incorrectly apply the Poison trigger visual effect to enemies that did not have the Poison State.
● Wheel of Destiny
○ Fixed an issue where the "Cannot Play Cards" Effect applied by the Wheel of Destiny "Dreaming of Wonderland" was not cleared when the "Conscious Interference" State ended.
○ Fixed an issue where the "Cannot Play Cards" effect applied by the Wheel of Destiny "Dreaming of Wonderland" incorrectly used the "Card Seal" description.

● Stage
○ Fixed an issue where the description text of certain Cards was missing in some cases during exploration.
○ Fixed an issue where exiting the game and logging back in at a non-combat node in an "Astral Reign" Stage would incorrectly increase the Stage progress count.
○ Fixed an issue in "Investigation Data" where the Rouse description for Awakeners with a Base Aliemus other than 100 incorrectly displayed as "Gain 50 Aliemus." After the fix, it now reads "Gain 50% Base Aliemus."
○ Fixed an issue in some "Awakened Trial" Stages where, if Only 1 Awakener was deployed, the Blood bar and Realm Effect would incorrectly follow along when that Awakener performed an Attack.
○ Fixed an issue where the description of the "Astral Reign" Relic "Jade Imprint" incorrectly required the Non-Derived Command Card to be consumed to be "in Hand." After the fix, it now reads "Choose 1 Non-Derived Command Card of the corresponding Awakener and consume it."
○ Fixed an issue where Cards copied by the "Astral Reign" Relic "Jade Imprint" incorrectly inherited States such as "Fiamma". After the fix, copied Cards are "Basic Copy".
○ Fixed an issue where the enemy Web of Betrayal "Nefraea"'s intent "Alea Iacta Est" was incorrectly applying the "Stagnation" Effect to non-Command Cards as well.
○ Fixed an issue where the Dispel Debuff Effect of enemy "Lady of the Depths"'s intent "Vortex Reversed" would incorrectly dispel the Keeper's debuffs.

● Traphase
○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Pontos" Exalt "Relentless Hunt" was inconsistent with Counter logic. After the fix, when an ally receives lethal DMG, the DMG will no longer be transferred to "Pontos," and when "Pontos" receives lethal DMG, the DMG will no longer be transferred to enemies.
○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Arachne"'s Exalt "Moira, As I Decree" could not correctly block lethal DMG after the Awakener's Revival.
○ Fixed an issue where a long-pressed Card could get stuck on the screen in certain situations, requiring another Card to be played to restore normal behavior.
○ Fixed multiple instances of missing descriptions outside of combat, such as the Awakener's "Skill" "Prepare", "Can be used 3 times", etc. After the fix, they are consistent with the actual Effect.
○ Fixed an issue on PC where, when selecting a target using a directional Skill, other Cards could be incorrectly played via shortcut keys.
○ Fixed an issue where the Posse "Spring's Verse" was not displaying the Effect description.

[General]
● Communicator
○ Fixed an issue where the Keeper themselves would incorrectly appear in the contact list.
● Announcement
○ Fixed an issue where text in certain languages, such as Korean, would incorrectly display as squares in some maintenance announcements.
● Handbook
○ Fixed an issue where "Daily Drills" or "Weekly Trials" would display an unremovable red dot in certain situations.
● Mythag Shop
○ Fixed an issue where, after purchasing all gift boxes in the "Limited-Time Gift Box" and claiming all rewards, switching to another store page and returning would incorrectly display a blank page.
● Alumni
○ Fixed an issue where the hint text was incorrect when clicking "Follow All" in "Follower-Add" after reaching the follow limit. After the fix, the hint now reads "Follow limit reached."
● Traphase
○ Fixed an issue where rapidly switching Cards in "Collection-Rankings" after receiving the hint "Requests are too frequent, please try again later," the wins ranking page would incorrectly continue displaying "Data loading," preventing ranking data from displaying properly.
○ Fixed an issue where watching longer "Traphase" battle replays would sometimes prompt a timeout message. The timeout duration has now been increased from 20 seconds to 30 seconds.
○ Fixed an issue where the relative sort order of Cards was inconsistent between the "All" tab and type tabs in "Collection" and "Preset Lineup".
明著削幻影牌組啊
噢不
幻影已死
Finally helot nerf
Gg wp
Now need to test things out
尼玛怎不改骑士诗啊？
怎不把鸟弟幻影算力拔高啊？
直接把幻影这么改，你改名吧
特色已经完全丧失了

里面也就鸟弟的幻影有的挂他专属的状态
你他丫的拔高他起始算力就好啦
还有鸟弟的命轮你不会直接改到和诞墨命轮一样就好吗？

呢喃对某些角色会太强？
